no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./cmd ./internal/agent/...
reason: The requested guardrails are already present: `ddx try` and `ddx work` reject `--no-review` without `--no-review-i-know-what-im-doing` in `cli/cmd/try.go` and `cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go`; `RunPostMergeReview` ignores `review:skip` unless a sibling `review:skip-reason:*` label exists in `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_post_review.go`; and the corresponding tests already cover both paths in `cli/cmd/try_test.go`, `cli/cmd/work_test.go`, and `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_test.go`. The focused CLI and agent test slice passed in this worktree.
